programme.title: قيم: Ep 13
programme.desc: نبذة : برنامج اسري.

programme.title: سنه من السنين: Ep 12
programme.desc: برنامج سنه من السنين : يتحدث مقدم البرنامج عن حوادث عايشها اهل دبي في فترات متفاوتة عبر السنين ويسرد قصصا يوثق من خلالها هذه الحوادث في اطار تشويقي ليقدم رسالة بأهمية المحافظة على تاريخ المكان وقيمته.

programme.title: 33: Ep 13
programme.desc: بعد غيبوبة استمرت 33 سنة، تستيقظ عائشة لتجد نفسها في دبي عام 2025 بدلًا من 1992. كان عمرها 25 عامًا حين دخلت الغيبوبة، لكنها اليوم في الـ58، بينما ابنها الصغير صار أبًا، وأختها نجمة على تيك توك. بين الصدمة والدهشة، تحاول عائشة التأقلم مع عالم جديد مليء بالهواتف الذكية، الإنترنت، والذكاء الاصطناعي، في رحلة تمزج بين الدراما والكوميديا حول الصراع بين الماضي والحاضر.

programme.title: قيم: Ep 10
programme.desc: نبذة : برنامج اسري.

programme.title: Diaries Of An Eccentric Family
programme.desc: Abu Samel continues his efforts to fend off the problems caused by his family and neighbors, while rooftop gatherings give rise to new schemes and embarrassing situations unfold at the perfume shop. Reem Abdullah, Majed Mutrib Fawwaz.

programme.title: Last Words
programme.desc: Mohamed Al Essa, Mohamed Al Qass.

programme.title: Ramez and The Ultimate Level
programme.desc: Ramez Galal returns with a new set of pranks for Ramadan this year, where he hosts a group of entertainment and sports stars to put them through difficult challenges that test their composure. Ramez Galal.

programme.title: Malek Bel Tawila
programme.desc: Technology In a short, entertaining presentation of just a few minutes, Malik Al Rouqi narrates the stories of many influential figures in human history and the most prominent events throughout time easily and enjoyably. Malik El-Rouky, Malek Al Rouqi.

programme.title: Tranquility
programme.desc: Ahmad Al Shugairi.

programme.title: In The Footsteps Of The Prophet
programme.desc: A group of children journeys to the Two Holy Mosques and sacred sites to discover key moments in the life of Prophet Muhammad ﷺ during Ramadan and Hajj, experiencing his story firsthand. Jawad Al Swisry.

programme.title: Kingdom Trail
programme.desc: Travels Driving across the Kingdom, Bassam Al-Fifi travels between its cities and villages, uncovering the stories of its people and the beauty of its landscapes in a journey filled with adventure and spontaneous encounters. Bassam Al Faifi.

programme.title: Our Breakfast Is Unique
programme.desc: Chef Omar Al Watban presents a variety of Ramadan Iftar recipes every day, clearly and simply explaining the ingredients and preparation steps for viewers. Omar Al Watban.

programme.title: Hide And Seek
programme.desc: In the 1970s, Wedad, a blind mother, struggles as her daughters try to take advantage of her vulnerability, exposing deep family conflicts, societal pressures, and the traditions and norms of their community. Huda Hussien, Mahmoud Boushehri.

programme.title: Al Aasha Street
programme.desc: In 1970s Riyadh, Aziza recalls a youth shared with her sister Awatif and the fierce Bedouin Wadha, where love, ambition, and defiance shaped who they would become. Elham Ali, Aixa Kay.

programme.title: Kahilan
programme.desc: In Najd, where tribal traditions shape destiny, two horsemen of the same blood and ambition face off, as conspiracies unfold, loyalties are tested, and a forbidden love deepens the stakes of their rivalry. Mutrib Fawaz, Bashir Al Ghoneim.

programme.title: Release
programme.desc: Wrongly accused of murdering his wife, Abbas Al Rayes is sentenced to fifteen years in prison. After his release, Abbas is consumed by a thirst for revenge and a desire for salvation. Amr Saad, Hatem Salah.

programme.desc: Debate An interactive space where fans share their passion for Saudi football by discussing league matches, talking about their favorite clubs, and exploring the history and meaning of championships. Abd Al Rahman Al Hamidy.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: As Dracula plans for his daughter Mavis' 118th birthday, he makes sure to remind her daily about the dangers of humans. Yet his warnings are overlooked when the first human to enter Hotel Transylvania catches her attention. Adam Sandler, Andy Samberg, Selena Gomez, Kevin James, Steve Buscemi, Peter Baynham, Robert Smigel, Genndy Tartakovsky.

programme.title: Films And Stars
programme.desc: Arts A sneak peek of what's coming up in the art field, especially when it comes to the newly released movies and our favorite stars latest news. Alan Green.

programme.title: The Dark Tower
programme.desc: Little Jack firmly believes in the authenticity of his visions when he is transported to the Mid-World, where he crosses paths with an exceptional warrior dedicated to defending the dark tower against the nefarious figure known as the man in black. Idris Elba, Matthew McConaughey, Tom Taylor, Dennis Haysbert, Claudia Kim, Nikolaj Arcel, Akiva Goldsman.

programme.title: Celebrity Scoop
programme.desc: Staying up to date with all the latest celebrity news and continuously following the newest fashion shows and style trends across the entertainment and fashion world. Victoria Recano, Canaan Rubin.

programme.title: Sleepless In Seattle
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and radio talk show psychologist Marcia has asked her listening audience what they are wishing and dreaming of during this season of hope.A little boy, who is tuned in from Seattle calls in his wish which is a wife for his widowed father.Will the dream come true? Tom Hanks, Ross Malinger, Meg Ryan, Rita Wilson, Victor Garber, Jeff Arch.

programme.title: No Reservations
programme.desc: A hard-edged chef whose life is turned upside down when she decides to take in her young niece following a tragic accident that killed her sister. Catherine Zeta-Jones, Aaron Eckhart, Abigail Breslin, Patricia Clarkson, Jenny Wade, Scott Hicks, Carol Fuchs, Catherine Zeta Jones.

programme.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
programme.desc: When Peter tried to recover from a heartbreak, he goes to Hawaii to relax, but destiny brings him to meet his ex Sarah along with her new boyfriend. Nicholas Stoller, Jason Segel, Jason Segel, Kristen Bell, Paul Rudd, Mila Kunis, Russell Brand, Bill Hader.

programme.title: Action Zone
programme.desc: People An entertaining program which concerns about cinemas' production and displays some shows and news for the newest movies and interviews the actors to tell us about their movies. Alan Green.

programme.title: Julie and Julia
programme.desc: Julia Child's contemporary life is being revived by the blogger, Julie, who challenges herself to cook all Child's first book recipes. Meryl Streep, Amy Adams, Chris Messina, Stanley Tucci, Linda Emond, Nora Ephron, Nora Ephron.

programme.title: All My Life
programme.desc: A heart-breaking true love story of a courageous engaged couple who finds out that one of them got confirmed with terminal liver cancer but yet still setting up an inspiring plan to their wedding party. Jessica Rothe, Harry Shum Jr., Marielle Scott, Chrissie Fit, Jay Pharoah, Marc Meyers, Todd Rosenberg.

programme.title: Making The Movies
programme.desc: A look at the behind-the-scenes of movie making and interviews footage. Natalia Garcia, Elijah Wood, Orlando Bloom, Sean Astin.

programme.title: The Fall Of The King
programme.desc: Kenan Baran, a wealthy and narcissist businessman, leads a secretive double life filled with emotional turmoil. However, when the challenges he encounters reach critical turning points, he is compelled to reassess his mindset and reshape his life. Halit Ergenç, Merve Dizdar, Aslihan Gurbuz, Nilperi Sahinkaya, Nalan Kuruçim, Durul Taylan, Yagmur Taylan, Eylem Akin.

programme.title: The Distant City
programme.desc: Alya Albora goes to Mardin from Canada with her son and her late husband's body, to fulfill his final wish and bury him in his hometown. When she tries to return to Canada, however, tribal chief Cihan Albora doesn't let her leave with her son. Ozan Akbaba, Sinem Unsal.

programme.title: The Imposters
programme.desc: The intertwined paths of Kadir and Ertan, a father and son duo of lawyers who often bend the rules to win, and Asya, a young woman struggling to support her family, who finds herself caught in a web of schemes and deceptions. Ali Bilgin, Beste Sultan Kasapogullari.

programme.title: The Price
programme.desc: Desperate to afford her son's treatment for a severe illness, widow Sarah turns to her manager, Zein, who agrees to help on one condition: she must spend one night with him. Bassel Khaiat, Nicola Meawad, Razane Jammal, Sarah Abi Kanaan, Ali Yones, Fekret Qady, Yam Mashhady, Nicolas Mouawad, Sara Abi Kanaan, Sara Abi Kan'an.

programme.title: Together In All Times
programme.desc: Farah faces a difficult situation when her manager asks her to organize the wedding of her ex-boyfriend. Nicolas Mouawad, Pamela Al Kik.

programme.title: Route
programme.desc: Despite their different social and cultural classes, their relationship turns into marriage, unfortunately these differences still threatening their happiness. Aabed Fahd, Nadine Nassib Njeim.

programme.title: The Price
programme.desc: Desperate to afford her son's treatment for a severe illness, widow Sarah turns to her manager, Zein, who agrees to help on one condition: she must spend one night with him. programme.title: Confusion
programme.desc: A young man confronts his family and tries to overcome the problems caused by his dominant father to marry the woman he loves. Alexander Uloom, Zahraa Bin Meem, Ayad Al Taei, Bara' Azzobaidy, Bakr Khalid, Haider Abed Thamer, Hamed Al Maleky, Mahir Birav, Zahraa Ben Meem.

programme.title: Envy
programme.desc: Deprived of her mother's love and overshadowed by her privileged brother, Seniha, trapped in her own home, seethes with resentment until long-suppressed jealousy drives her toward a breaking point that could shatter their wealthy family's facade. Ozgu Namal, Selahattin Pasali.

programme.title: Envy
programme.desc: Deprived of her mother's love and overshadowed by her privileged brother, Seniha, trapped in her own home, seethes with resentment until long-suppressed jealousy drives her toward a breaking point that could shatter their wealthy family's facade. Ozgu Namal, Selahattin Pasali.

programme.title: Girls' Mistake
programme.desc: A single mistake by one of his daughters shakes the stability of the entire family, and the father's harshness turns him into a nightmare. The daughters pay the price through marriage, until the mother finds the strength to stand up and protect her family. Elham Al Fadalah, Jamal Al Radhan.

programme.title: Al Jaradiyah Neighborhood
programme.desc: Saqr bin Suleiman's return to Al Jaradiyah seems to promise a peaceful new beginning, but behind his composed demeanor and quiet presence burns an unrelenting desire to avenge the loss of his parents. Mohamed Al Qass, Nirmeen Mohsen.

programme.title: Mrs. Monalisa
programme.desc: Monalisa believes she has found true happiness when she gets married and settles in Cairo, but her dreams soon fade when she discovers the truth about the man she married and her family, who traded her for money, opening the gates of hell wide before her. Mai Omar, Sawsan Badr.

programme.title: City Kitchen
programme.desc: A devoted chef's world crumbles when his daughter disappears, and in the frantic search for her, the family is thrown into chaos, testing their values, loyalties, and the very bonds that hold their family together. Amal Arafa, Maxim Khalil.

programme.title: Devastated
programme.desc: In the 1990s, Kuwait, Arif, and Dananir grapple with their rebellious children, blinded by wealth and consumed by greed. Caught between the parents' attempts to maintain family stability through love and the children's relentless pursuit of money, their family is on the verge of collapse. Dawood Hussein, Taif.

programme.title: Our Preacher

programme.title: Mrs. Monalisa
programme.desc: Monalisa believes she has found true happiness when she gets married and settles in Cairo, but her dreams soon fade when she discovers the truth about the man she married and her family, who traded her for money, opening the gates of hell wide before her. Mai Omar, Sawsan Badr.

programme.title: City Kitchen
programme.desc: A devoted chef's world crumbles when his daughter disappears, and in the frantic search for her, the family is thrown into chaos, testing their values, loyalties, and the very bonds that hold their family together. Amal Arafa, Maxim Khalil.

programme.title: Devastated
programme.desc: In the 1990s, Kuwait, Arif, and Dananir grapple with their rebellious children, blinded by wealth and consumed by greed. Caught between the parents' attempts to maintain family stability through love and the children's relentless pursuit of money, their family is on the verge of collapse. Dawood Hussein, Taif.

programme.title: Girls' Mistake
programme.desc: A single mistake by one of his daughters shakes the stability of the entire family, and the father's harshness turns him into a nightmare. The daughters pay the price through marriage, until the mother finds the strength to stand up and protect her family. Elham Al Fadalah, Jamal Al Radhan.

programme.title: Our Preacher
programme.desc: In a remote village, Gaber becomes a revered figure after claiming to be the long awaited preacher. Yet as the villagers place their faith in him, he lives in constant fear of exposure, haunted by an inner voice reminding him he is a fraud. Tim Hassan, Mona Wassef.

programme.title: عش
programme.desc: S1 E14 يستولي محمود على أرض مروان بالقوة ولكن مديحة أم مروان تكشف أمره، كما يضع يده على رقم مروان القديم.

programme.title: عش
programme.desc: S1 E15 يتم استبدال مذكرات مروان بمذكرات أخرى جديدة بعد أن زورتها العائلة كما تعترف رنا لمروان لأول مرة أنها تحبه.

programme.title: عش
programme.desc: S1 E16 بعد محاولات كثيرة، تنجح مديحة أخيراً في الحصول على مذكرات مروان الحقيقية واستبدالها بالمذكرات المزورة، فيما ينجح دكتور مروان ورنا في فتح الخزنة، كما يفاجأ مروان بوجود ملف قضية حجر على والده سالم إبراهيم.

programme.title: الخانكة الموس
programme.desc: S1 E13 يتوجه سليم إلى مدرسة عاصم ليقوم بحل الإشكال مع المديرة، ويعدها بأن الأخير لن يتسبب بالمزيد من المشاكل، بينما تتغير معاملة مدحت مع إنجي. من ناحية ثانية، يكتشف سليم أمراً خطيراً يتعلق بعاصم.\n.

programme.title: الخانكة الموس
programme.desc: S1 E14 يكتشف سليم موضوع عادل الذي دأب على الاتصال بتيا كثيراً، أما مدحت فيذهب مع خطيبته إنجي إلى الطبيبة لاستشارتها بشأن الأخيرة، فيما يتقدم الطبيب رائد بطلب انسحابه من لجنة متابعة حالة أميرة.\n.

programme.title: الخانكة الموس
programme.desc: S1 E15 تنشأ علاقة صداقة بين أميرة وهايدي، فيما تعود الحاجة عائشة إلى السجن بعد حكم اللجنة المعنية بمسؤوليتها عن أفعالها. أما عاصم، فيعود إلى مدرسته بعد حل الإشكال.\n.

programme.title: الخانكة الموس
programme.desc: S1 E16 تتقرب لارا من عاصم وتكسب ثقته، أما مراد وسليم فيقومان بتوريط نادر، فيما يستمر عادل في محاولاته لاستدراج تيا، وتتوطد علاقة سليم ونور.\n.

programme.title: الخانكة الموس
programme.desc: S1 E17 تنهال السجينة الجديدة بالضرب على أميرة إلى أن تفقد وعيها، فيما يكتشف سليم أن حسين قام بالتخطيط لقتل أميرة ويثور عليه ويطلب منه أن يسرع في إصلاح الأمور.\n.

programme.title: أنا بنت أبي الموس

programme.title: عش
programme.desc: S1 E14 يستولي محمود على أرض مروان بالقوة ولكن مديحة أم مروان تكشف أمره، كما يضع يده على رقم مروان القديم.

programme.title: عش
programme.desc: S1 E15 يتم استبدال مذكرات مروان بمذكرات أخرى جديدة بعد أن زورتها العائلة كما تعترف رنا لمروان لأول مرة أنها تحبه.

programme.title: عش
programme.desc: S1 E16 بعد محاولات كثيرة، تنجح مديحة أخيراً في الحصول على مذكرات مروان الحقيقية واستبدالها بالمذكرات المزورة، فيما ينجح دكتور مروان ورنا في فتح الخزنة، كما يفاجأ مروان بوجود ملف قضية حجر على والده سالم إبراهيم.

programme.title: عش
programme.desc: S1 E17 يواجه مروان مديحة بملف قضية الحجر على والده فتحاول تبرير موقفها، ثم يتهم دينا ومحمود بوجود علاقة سابقة بينهما. من ناحية ثانية، تهدد مديحة مروان بأن ردها سيكون قاسياً إن قرر التبرع بأمواله.

programme.title: عش
programme.desc: S1 E18 يؤكد الطبيب أن الحيوانات تم تسميمها فيما يحاول محمود ودينا رفع قضية حجر على مروان دون علم مديحة. أما مروان، فيعود إلى الفيلا لأخذ مذكراته الحقيقية.
